research_ranking.label: TRADEOFF_ECON_POSITIVE_STRESS_PROXY_NEGATIVE
notes: research ranking uses economic proxies first; sample and risk gates are reported separately
residual or pair-cost tail budget failures are TRADEOFF/BLOCKER evidence unless economic PnL turns negative
conservative stress proxy subtracts full residual_cost and pair-tail-loss proxy; source-of-truth settlement may differ

interpretation: The local state-machine already applies size-aware seed qty constraints available in candidate_base.
When restricted to the shadow-observed base_qty<=2 and deficit_1_2 surface, fill-to-balance no longer represents the broad local cap mechanism.
The diagnostic no-order shadow showed only one cap and 0.0425 qty reduction, so the prior local KEEP does not currently transfer to the live/no-order path.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_SHADOW_ALIGNED_FILL_TO_BALANCE_RESEARCH_ONLY
notes: This is local completion candidate-pipeline research only, not deployable evidence.
The config is shadow-aligned to edge=0.07 and max_open_cost=80 to match the failed same-host shadow surface.
Promotion still requires no-order shadow and source-of-truth replay validation.

next_executable_action: Name the remaining missing fields and run only a local no-network parity verifier before any EC2 shadow.

notes: This artifact is local causal verification only.
No shadow/canary promotion can use this without a later no-order shadow and source-of-truth replay.

research_ranking.label: UNKNOWN_SIZE_AWARE_FILL_TO_BALANCE_MIXED
notes: Current candidate-pipeline state machine already uses the same base seed qty formula available locally: min(max_seed_qty, public_trade_size*fill_haircut, target_room, open_cost_room, imbalance_room).
The all-fill-to-balance local KEEP is dominated by size buckets that did not appear in the diagnostic no-order shadow.
The shadow-observed-size-bucket variant tests only the base_qty<=2 and deficit_1_2 opportunity surface seen in pulled diagnostic summaries.
